description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a wide, square base and a tall, conical body. The cone features two broad, white reflective stripes encircling its midsection, both of which show signs of wear and fading. The surface of the cone is slightly scuffed and matte, indicating exposure to outdoor elements and frequent handling. The base is thick, flat, and octagonal, designed to provide stability and prevent tipping, with subtle texturing visible on its surface. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, matching the orange color of the rest of the cone. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible anywhere on the object.
description: An orange traffic cone with two worn white reflective stripes and a wide, stable octagonal base. The surface is matte and slightly scuffed, with no visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two faded white stripes and a wide, octagonal base, with visible scuff marks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same two white stripes and the sturdy base, with slightly different wear patterns on the stripes.
description_view_2: Another angled view of the cone, showing the reflective stripes and the base's thickness and texture.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the cone's orange body, worn white stripes, and the full octagonal base with visible surface wear.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two broad, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the cone's midsection, each approximately 10-12 cm wide, spaced evenly apart.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, flat, and octagonal, made of thick plastic for stability, with subtle surface texturing and no visible ribbing or weighting.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: Lightly used, with visible scuff marks, some fading on the reflective stripes, and minor surface wear.
